pr_text:
## Title: Fix thread-safety issues in LTE UE measurements accessors

### Summary
The LTE UE measurement accessor functions perform unsynchronized reads from shared PHY variables structures (`PHY_vars_UE_g`), creating race conditions when multiple threads access measurement data concurrently. Functions like `get_PL()`, `get_RSRQ()`, `get_n_adj_cells()`, and `get_rx_total_gain_dB()` read fields from `ue->measurements` and related structures without acquiring proper locks, leading to potential data
